titleStmt.title: SII 39.228: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 228. (A.R. No. 228 of 1916.) SEṄGANMĀL, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SEṄGANMĀLĪŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN JAṬĀVARMAṈ SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-13TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription mentions the rate of monthly rent to be paid by the merchants and weavers who had settled in the tirumaḍai-viḷāgam of the temple of Śeṅgaṇmālīśvaramuḍaiya-Nāyaṇār and also mentions the name of officers Viśaiyapāla and Varaguṇarāya who endorsed the request submitted by the tenants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī taiyūr Uṭaiyār ceṅkaṇmālicuramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākam tiripuva
ṉac cakkaravattikaḷ koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu
10 3vatu ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Āmurkkoṭṭattuk kumuḻi nāṭṭut tai
yyūr Āṉa Irācakecari nallūr Uṭaiyār ceṅkaṇmālicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil
tāṉattārkku ciṟumuṟi Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattil patiṉmuṉṟāvatu mārkaḻi mātam Aiñcā
ntiyativaraiyuṅ kuṭiyeṟātapaṭiyāle Ittirumaṭaiviḷākattiṟ kuṭiyeṟ
viyāpārikaḷ kuṭiyeṟum Iṭattu mātam Oṉṟukku Aṉaittāyam Uṭpaṭa kāṟpaṇaṅ koḷḷak ka
ṭavatākavum niyāyattār kuṭiyeṟumiṭattu piḷḷaittaṟi pirāyattaṟi Uṭpaṭa nāvittaṟi ku Āṇṭu
Oṉṟukku Eppeṟpaṭṭa kaṭamai poṉvari viṉiyokam Uṭpaṭat taṟi Oṉṟukku nālāka vanta paṇaṅkoḷḷi
kuṭi Eṟṟalām Eṉṟu taiyūr Ūravarkkut tāṉattār collukaiyāle Ippaṭi ceyvatākap piḷḷai vicaiya
pālarkkum piḷḷai varakuṇarāyaṟkku viṇṇappañ ceytu Ivarkaḷ caṇṭaiyiṭum ṉamutu vittuttaru � Ippa
ṭikku Icciṟumuṟi piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Ēṟuṅkuṭikaḷ Ēṟṟi vum vāṇiyar cekku Iṭṭut tarikkum Iṭattut ti
ruviṭavantaiyil Iruntu Iṟukkiṟa vāṇiyaṉ Iṟukkum Iḷaiyiṟpittu Eṭṭāka vanta kaṭamai Iṟuppārkaḷāmpaṭi paṇ
ṇavum Ippaṭikku Ittirumaṭaiviḷākattile cilālekai paṇṇik koḷḷavum pārppatu Ippaṭi mutalāṉa paṇat
til Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkkup pūcaip peṟṟukku pattil Aiñcāl vanta mutal kaḻittuk koḷḷavum nikki Uḷḷa mutala
Irāca paṇṭāramākac celavaṟukkavum pārppatu paṇiyāl nāṭṭukkaṇakku toṇṭai maṇṭala veḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
